name: Oriental Lazy Boys
description: West Side Oriental Lazy Boyz are a predominately Cambodian street gang located in the Chinatown community near downtown Los Angeles near Alpine Park. They are one of the first gangs among the Oriental Family and among the very few Asian gangs with a physical territory in the city of Los Angeles. They also were among the only Asian gangs to have ties with a Blood set.

sources.title: Oriental Lazy Boys in Chinatown, Central Los Angeles — StreetGangs
